entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country in South Asia where rural populations suffer from hunger and poverty.

entities.name: HUNGER
entities.description: A state of suffering from lack of food.

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of being extremely poor.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall that adversely affects the economy and agriculture.

entities.name: PURCHASING POWER
entities.description: The financial ability of households to buy goods.

entities.name: RURAL UNEMPLOYMENT
entities.description: The lack of employment opportunities in rural areas.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient, affordable, and nutritious food.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The susceptibility of a system to the adverse effects of climate change.

entities.name: ODISHA
entities.description: A state in India where the study's primary data was collected.

entities.name: POLYCHORIC PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical technique used to construct the aggregate food security index.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY INDEX
entities.description: An aggregate measure used to assess the level of food security.

entities.name: ORDERED PROBIT MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to estimate the determinants of food security.

entities.name: JOINT FAMILY
entities.description: A family structure identified as a determinant of food security.

entities.name: EDUCATION
entities.description: A key variable that determines food security.

entities.name: MIGRATION
entities.description: A key variable that determines food security.

entities.name: HEALTH INSURANCE
entities.description: A key variable that determines food security.

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region including India and similar countries facing food security and drought risks.
